name: Visions Door 2 Door Sch
recent_news: Active small-vehicle alt-transport operator branded Visions D2D Transportation serving Chicago South Suburbs; markets specialized SPED accommodations (sensory toys, weighted vests, iPads) and de-escalation-trained staff.
fit_notes: Independent IL alt-transport / SPED van operator in Summit's Chicago footprint; ~$2.5M rev / 48 employees fits classic tuck-in profile if owner-led succession is in play. Niche SPED book is strategically interesting but small.

name: Transportation Citicare
districts_or_customers: Lake Zurich CUSD 95 area (Chicago northwest suburbs)
recent_news: BBB profile opened 2011; B- rating with unresolved complaint. Operates as Citicare Inc d/b/a Citicare Transportation; mixed BBB/Indeed reviews citing low pay and vehicle reliability concerns.
fit_notes: Small IL school/medical van operator in Chicago northwest suburbs (Summit footprint). Modest scale (~$2.1M), questionable operational quality signals; possible tuck-in but diligence flag on safety/fleet condition.

name: Aventurine School TRNSPRTN LLC
recent_news: USDOT 3754637, active intrastate non-hazmat passenger carrier registered in San Fernando, CA; FMCSA shows only 1 power unit / 1 driver (registration last updated Oct 2021, flagged outdated as of 2026). Employee count (~42) in source data conflicts sharply with FMCSA fleet size.
fit_notes: Likely de minimis micro-operator (1 unit per FMCSA) despite source-listed employees/revenue; not a credible tuck-in unless data is materially wrong. Skip unless reverification shows actual fleet.

name: My School Bus Driver's
recent_news: No web/FMCSA presence located; Lancaster, CA student transportation is dominated by AVSTA (Antelope Valley Schools Transportation Agency JPA) serving Antelope Valley UHSD, Westside USD, and Lancaster SD. Entity may be a recent micro-LLC or independent contractor working under AVSTA/charter routes.
fit_notes: Unverifiable; effectively no digital footprint. Lancaster market controlled by AVSTA JPA, so private contractor opportunity is narrow. Pass unless ground-level diligence finds real fleet.

name: School Van Group Of Amer Inc
recent_news: Newly-formed entity (source year 2025) with thin online presence; landing-page-only website (schoolvangroupofamerica.com) tagged 'Empowering Education Through Transportation.' No FMCSA, district contract, or news coverage located. Possible affiliation/branding parallel with Yellow Bus Group of America (yellowbusgroupofamerica.com), worth diligence.
fit_notes: Brand-new IL alt-transport startup; too early for tuck-in (no proven contracts or fleet visible). Monitor — owner Jacob Lawson may be building a roll-up vehicle (note parallel 'Yellow Bus Group of America' brand) rather than running a stable bus contractor.
